productDisplayName: Globalite Women Grey Startech Sports Shoes
description: Style Note These globalite StarTech shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Product Details Grey shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and pink trims Mesh inner and tongue Thick midsole grooved at the periphery Two piece TPU outsole with horizontal grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
